oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Attention Is All You Need: A Revisitation
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Vaswani, Ashish
Shazeer, Noam
Parmar, Niki
Uszkoreit, Jakob
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: cs.CL
cs.AI
cs.LG
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks that include an encoder and a decoder. The best performing models also connect the encoder and decoder through an attention mechanism. We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms.
